results.content_extraction_failure_reason: SetForegroundWindow returned False — Task Scheduler /IT process cannot steal foreground from Chrome window owned by user session. Clipboard extraction requires foreground ownership for SendKeys to target correct window.

assessment.content_reading_limitation: Windows foreground window ownership — a known OS-level limitation for cross-process input simulation
workaround_options: Launch Chrome from within the same task (ensures foreground ownership)
Use AppActivate with process name instead of SetForegroundWindow
Use AttachThreadInput to share foreground rights
Use accessibility TextPattern directly (but Chrome doesn't expose doc content via TextPattern)
